# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Safe Agent Box

```text
Agent Box Name:
Goal:
Permission Level:
Allowed paths:
Blocked paths:
Human Gate triggers:
Readback required:
```

## Change type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Template
- [ ] Prompt
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Release note
- [ ] Other

## Readback

```text
Files changed:
Reason for change:
Checks done:
Known limitations:
Next checkpoint:
```

## Boundary

- [ ] No private data included
- [ ] No release action performed
- [ ] No deployment action performed
- [ ] Human Gate respected
